---
title: "AI for UVM Economics"
subtitle: "Modular AI literacy resources for UVM Economics students and faculty"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold only
This site is a skeleton. Content, module structure, and navigation are placeholders. See [the sample module](modules/a1-what-llms-do.qmd) for the intended format.
:::

## What Is This?

<!-- TODO: Describe the purpose of this site and who it's for -->

## Modules

<!-- TODO: Add module table once modules are developed. Suggested tracks:
- Foundations (A-track): What LLMs do, prompting, when to use AI
- Technical (B-track): Terminal, Git/GitHub
- Econ Workflows (C-track): Lit review, code, data, writing, math
- Faculty Quick Start (F-track): Short app-first modules
-->

## About

Created by [Emily Beam](https://eabeam.github.io), Department of Economics, University of Vermont.

Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org). Source on [GitHub](https://github.com/eabeam/uvmecon-ai).
